caption: Just found @dave_russo_hist on Etsy. DBQ scaffolding bundles are exactly what I needed. Highly recommend for any APUSH teacher.
Sunday pozole with @dave_russo_hist. He did not stir it once but he did grade papers at the table. Points for multitasking.
My human @dave_russo_hist gave me the whole Neponset Trail tonight. No rushing. 5 stars.
Shoutout to @dave_russo_hist for the new BEU bulletin board in Room 214. Know your rights. Know your contract.
@dave_russo_hist is doing incredible work bringing Triangle Shirtwaist and labor history into BPS classrooms. This is how you teach history.
Teacher spotlight: @dave_russo_hist and the APUSHResourceVault Etsy shop. Follow for DBQ packets and primary source sets.
@dave_russo_hist representing Eastbridge strong at today citywide rally. BPS solidarity in action. #BEU #ContractNow
Game 5 at the Garden with @dave_russo_hist. We stood for the last six minutes. Worth every second. Celtics in 6.
Dinner at ours with @dave_russo_hist and @rachel_miller_rn. Moqueca was on point. Biscuit also attended.
Marching with @dave_russo_hist and the Eastbridge chapter today. Loud and proud. #ContractNow #BEU
Thank you @dave_russo_hist for bringing 28 Eastbridge students to the battlefield this week. Seeing students moved by this place never gets old.
Featured educator: @dave_russo_hist on using primary sources in the APUSH classroom. Excellent work out of Boston Public Schools.
Passed @dave_russo_hist and Biscuit on the Neponset Trail tonight. That dog is living his best life. #Dorchester
Teacher spotlight: @dave_russo_hist uses our special collections for APUSH primary source lessons at Eastbridge High.
Dorchester educator @dave_russo_hist of Eastbridge High is selling APUSH resources nationwide through Etsy shop APUSHResourceVault.
Walking Old North Church with @dave_russo_hist. This man narrates every block of Boston history whether you ask or not. We love it.
Congrats to @dave_russo_hist on 71 percent AP passing rate at Eastbridge this year. That is incredible work. #APUSH #HistoryTeacher
New APUSHResourceVault drop from @dave_russo_hist. Labor history bundle from Pullman Strike to present day. #APUSH
Friday dinner at ours. @dave_russo_hist and @rachel_miller_rn brought wine and a very needy beagle. 10 out of 10 guests.
Building rep @dave_russo_hist keeping Eastbridge chapter fired up at the June rally. Thank you for everything. #BEU
@dave_russo_hist and I had the Ashmont Grill brunch and the full Neponset Trail today. I am a very lucky dog.
Spotted @dave_russo_hist at Old North Church this Saturday explaining the signal lanterns to every tourist within earshot. National treasure.
